name: Storm Watcher
description: LoopAgent that continuously polls NOAA/NWS APIs to monitor Tampa Bay weather threats, track NHC storms, and escalate threat levels. Runs in a continuous loop with configurable polling intervals.

skills.name: Fetch KTPA Weather Observations
skills.description: Fetches live weather observations from Tampa International Airport (KTPA) via NWS API. Returns temperature, wind speed/direction, pressure, and conditions.
examples: What are the current wind conditions at Tampa Bay?
Fetch latest KTPA weather station data
Get current temperature and pressure at Tampa International

skills.name: Fetch NWS Active Alerts
skills.description: Retrieves active National Weather Service alerts for Tampa Bay counties (Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco, Manatee). Filters for Tampa Bay-specific alerts.
examples: Are there any active weather alerts for Tampa Bay?
Get current NWS warnings for Hillsborough County
Check for hurricane warnings in the Tampa Bay area

skills.name: Track NHC Active Storms
skills.description: Monitors the NHC Atlantic RSS feed for active tropical systems. Computes distance from Tampa Bay using Haversine formula and determines hurricane category.
examples: Are there any active hurricanes in the Atlantic?
How far is the nearest tropical storm from Tampa Bay?
Track Hurricane Helena's position and intensity

skills.name: Compute Threat Level
skills.description: Deterministically computes threat level (NONE/MONITORING/WATCH/WARNING/CRITICAL) from NOAA data. Uses storm distance, NWS alert severity, and KTPA wind speed thresholds.
examples: What is the current threat level for Tampa Bay?
Assess storm threat based on current NOAA data
Determine if evacuation orders are needed

sends.description: Loop iteration status with current threat level and weather data
Escalation notification when threat level increases
Final weather data package for parallel analysis
